caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture, likely focused on systems thinking and modeling. The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is visible in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking. The main content of the video is displayed on a dark background with various interconnected nodes and labels, suggesting a mind map or network diagram. Key elements include phrases like "models and methods," "developing models," "learn modeling," and "model sharing," which are highlighted in green text. A central image shows a 3D figure leaning against a large red question mark, symbolizing inquiry or problem-solving. The overall theme seems to revolve around the process of learning and applying modeling techniques within a collaborative framework. The browser tabs and bookmarks indicate that the presenter is using multiple resources, possibly for reference or additional context during the presentation.
